pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with JDK 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JDK 17+; using Spring Boot 2.7 with JDK 21 may cause compatibility issues or prevent usage of modern Spring features, and the migration goal explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property to set source/target compatibility; without this change, the project would compile for JDK 11, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or potentially causing runtime mismatches if the target environment is strictly JDK 21.
